## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (client)
- [ ] `npx tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit` passes (server)
- [ ] Inline styles only (no CSS files, no Tailwind)
- [ ] Dark UI only
- [ ] No new comments unless the WHY is non-obvious
